stem: The function q defined by q(t) = 18t + 7 gives the estimated height, in centimeters, of a cactus t months after Lana bought it. Which of the following is the best interpretation of 7 in this context?

answerOptions.content: The estimated height of the cactus, in centimeters, when Lana bought it
The estimated increase in the cactus's height, in centimeters, each month
The number of months Lana plans to keep the cactus
The estimated maximum height of the cactus, in centimeters

rationale:
Choice A is correct. The constant 7 is q(0), the value of q when t = 0, which represents the cactus's height when Lana bought it.

Choice B is the monthly rate of change (18). Choices C and D do not match the meaning of the constant term.
